name: The Mute

sheet.name: The Mute
sheet.background_story:
A mercenary who first appeared around the time of the Grand Festival. It seems nobody has witnessed them ever speak, thus their reason for fighting on the side of Agora's followers is unknown.

During the first battle at the Church of Her, The Mute strangled Blath [#2424] to death.

The Mute met their demise in the second battle at the Church, "pecked by the dark Crows."

https://twitter.com/wagdie_eth/status/1575168016341270533
